title: Energizer Recharge Universal - Rechargeable Batteries AAA (4 Pack) - 500 mAh NiMH Triple A Battery - 100% Recyclable Plastic Free Packaging
features: 4-pack of Energizer Accu Recharge Universal AAA batteries
Long Lasting: Energizer AAA rechargeable batteries last up to 2x longer than Energizer basic alkaline in digital cameras – results will vary by device
Trusted Power: AAA batteries for everyday high-tech devices, like toys, remote controls, torches and clocks
Leak Protection: Energizer rechargeable batteries AAA are designed to protect your essential devices from damaging leaks under normal use conditions
Rechargeable: Each AAA battery can be charged hundreds of times, with one charge lasting up to 12 months in storage
Customers’ Choice: Energizer is the world’s no.1 rechargeable brand, based on scan sales
Energizer Innovation: The world’s first rechargeable AAA battery made with 7% recycled batteries
description: Product Description Get the most from your everyday and high-tech devices with the reliable power of Energizer Accu Recharge Universal AAA batteries. Stock up on rechargeable solar light batteries and LED light batteries, as well as batteries for cameras, torches, clocks and remotes. Energizer Recharge AAA last up to 2x longer than Energizer basic alkaline in digital cameras. Energizer AAA batteries are also a great choice if you need a long-lasting gaming controller battery. Always ready when you are, AAA recharge batteries come fully charged and hold power for up to 12 months in storage. Each battery can be recharged hundreds of times, with up to 5-year battery life under typical usage patterns. And the batteries are also designed to protect your essential devices from damaging leaks under normal use conditions. Simply charge up your batteries with any Energizer Recharge Charger to power the devices you love. The Energizer Accu Recharge Universal range also includes AA batteries, so it’s easy to find reliable power in the size you need. Energizer understands how important it is to look after our planet and its green spaces. That’s why these batteries are sold in 100% recyclable, plastic-free packaging* that supports responsible forestry. Please note that the Energizer battery package you receive may vary from the packaging shown, depending on retail inventory. Thank you for your patience as we transition to recyclable packaging. *Excluding seals on select packaging Box Contains 4x batteries "Universal" HR03 AAA
